name: Abjuration
description: Spells that block, banish, or protect.

name: Conjuration
description: Spells that transport objects or creatures.

name: Enchantment
description: Spells that affect the minds of others.

name: Evocation
description: Spells that manipulate energy to create blasts.

name: Necromancy
description: Spells that manipulate life and death.

name: Transmutation
description: Spells that change the properties of matter.
